title: Scenario
description: Contract for a testkit catalog scenario (expected-result.json): the workflow to drive, the ordered human gate responses, and the assertions to project onto the captured run. The runtime loaders parse scenarios leniently; this schema is the test-only validation gate.

^_.description: Underscore-prefixed keys (e.g. _note) are author comments; ignored by the lenient loader.

type.description: The human-gate verb. input/review/stepApproval/escalation resume the standard pauses; toolApprove/toolReject resolve an AWAITING_TOOL_APPROVAL pause; toolContinue/toolRetry resolve an AWAITING_TOOL_DECISION pause.

reason.description: Rejection reason recorded for a toolReject gate; ignored by the other gate types, which use note.

toolInvocationId.description: Optional explicit pending tool-invocation id for a tool gate; when omitted the harness auto-targets the run's single current pending invocation (failing closed when there is not exactly one).
